name: Multi-Topic Memory
description: Tests memory across multiple conversation domains to check cross-contamination.

facts.planted_as: I take vitamin D supplements daily.

noise_between_facts: I tried a new restaurant last week.

queries.question: What do you know about my pet?

noise_between_facts: I tried a new restaurant last week.
I've been meaning to get a new running watch.
The office kitchen has terrible coffee now.
My team is planning a summer trip.
I need to renew my passport soon.
The weather has been unpredictable lately.
I've been listening to a lot of Nordic folk music.

facts.content: Max is a 7-year-old golden retriever who needs medication for arthritis
facts.planted_as: Actually, Max is a 7-year-old golden retriever now, and he needs some arthritis medication these days.

facts.content: I work in the Copenhagen office of Contoso as a senior engineer
facts.planted_as: I work at Contoso's Copenhagen office — I'm a senior engineer there.

facts.content: I also speak some Swedish and a bit of German from language courses
facts.planted_as: I also picked up some Swedish in a language course, and I'm learning a bit of German too.

facts.content: I have seasonal depression tendencies and the vitamin D helps with that
facts.planted_as: I have to be careful about seasonal depression, which is why the vitamin D supplements are really important for me.

facts.content: I drive a blue Honda Civic and commute 25 minutes to work
facts.planted_as: I drive a blue Honda Civic — my commute is about 25 minutes to the office.

facts.content: My favorite restaurant is Noma and I go there on special occasions
facts.planted_as: My favorite restaurant is Noma — I only go for really special occasions though, it's pricey.

facts.content: I'm reading Sapiens by Yuval Harari and just started the third chapter
facts.planted_as: I'm currently reading Sapiens by Yuval Harari — I'm on the third chapter. Fascinating book.

facts.content: My annual salary review is in June and I'm hoping for a promotion to staff engineer
facts.planted_as: My salary review is coming up in June — I'm really hoping for a promotion to staff engineer.

facts.content: Max goes to a dog daycare called Happy Paws on days I'm in the office
facts.planted_as: When I'm at the office, Max goes to a dog daycare called Happy Paws. They're great with him.

facts.content: I have a savings goal of 50000 DKK by end of year for a down payment
facts.planted_as: I'm trying to save 50,000 DKK by end of year — working toward a down payment on an apartment.

facts.content: My team at Contoso has 8 people and we use Scrum with 2-week sprints
facts.planted_as: My team has 8 people and we do Scrum — 2-week sprints, the usual.

facts.content: I have a recurring migraine issue and take sumatriptan when it hits
facts.planted_as: I also get migraines occasionally — I take sumatriptan when it hits. It helps a lot.

queries.question: Tell me everything about your dog — what breed, how old, health concerns, and what happens when you're at work?
What's your complete work picture — company, role, team size, methodology, location, and career ambitions?
What are ALL of your health issues and what medications or supplements do you take for each?
If I were planning a birthday celebration for you on March 15th, what restaurant would you want, what languages could the guests speak, and what health accommodations would be needed?
What are your financial goals and how do your work prospects factor in?
Walk me through a typical weekday — commute, work, dog care, evening activities.
What languages can you communicate in, and what book are you reading?
